title: Kaivalya Upanishad: The Aloneness
description: From the Kaivalya Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.
introduction: From the Kaivalya Upanishad — one of the foundational texts of Indian philosophy.

translation.text: I am all this. Higher than the highest. The luminous Self. The eternal Self. The self of all. The witness of all. Free from all qualities. Pure consciousness. The one without a second.
